status: CLOSED 2026-05-11. Sprint merged via PR #56 (merge_commit 9b6b3ea). PR-B (B1 envelope + B2 wire split) + PR-C (CommandStatus enum + transition matrix + dry-run/live boundary) shipped + 1 Codex P2 fix-up (frontend lookupHR envelope unwrap) absorbed.
head_summary: Merge pull request #55 from ykylee/claude/work_26_05_11-s4 (work_26_05_11 final PR)

decisions_made.summary: docs/backend_api_contract.md is authoritative; align code to docs when they diverge.
decisions_made.rationale: External clients/integrators need stable contract. Most new handlers already use {status, data} envelope, so divergence cost is low.

decisions_made.summary: dry-run skips store + audit + worker enqueue. live path uses store and worker.
decisions_made.rationale: dry-run is a preview of operator intent; store/audit retention adds noise without value.

decisions_made.summary: schema_version='1' as a string integer. Bump to '2', '3' on breaking changes. Defer semver to a future phase if backward-compat layering becomes load-bearing.
decisions_made.rationale: Simpler decoder + smaller envelope; semver value only kicks in when multiple versions coexist.

prs.subject: frontend wire vs UI types split

out_of_scope: PR-D T-M1-04 audit actor enrichment + request_id middleware + audit_logs migration — separate sprint (operational migration policy required)
